hero.headline: From Epoxy Floors to Leak-Proof Roofs
hero.subheading: Durable. Professional. Long-lasting solutions for industrial, commercial & residential spaces.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Premium flooring & waterproofing solutions tailored to your needs

items.title: Industrial Flooring
items.description: Heavy-duty epoxy flooring systems engineered for factories, warehouses, and industrial facilities with maximum durability.

items.title: Decorative Flooring
items.description: Beautiful granular and decorative epoxy finishes that transform any commercial or residential space with style.

items.title: Car Parking Flooring
items.description: Anti-skid, chemical-resistant parking floor coatings designed for high-traffic multi-level and basement parking areas.

items.title: Flake Flooring
items.description: Vibrant, chip-based epoxy flooring with customizable color blends for showrooms, garages, and retail spaces.

items.title: Digital Paper Flooring
items.description: Innovative digitally printed epoxy floors with custom patterns, logos, and artistic designs for unique interiors.

items.title: Waterproofing
items.description: Complete waterproofing solutions for roofs, basements, and wet areas using premium-grade coatings and membranes.

items.title: Italian Flooring
items.description: Luxurious Italian-style epoxy flooring with marble and stone-effect finishes for upscale residential and commercial projects.

items.title: Metallic Flooring
items.description: Stunning metallic epoxy floors with swirling, three-dimensional effects creating a luxurious, one-of-a-kind finish.

items.title: 3D Flooring
items.description: Eye-catching 3D epoxy floors with photorealistic designs and depth effects that captivate and impress visitors.

features.title: Why Choose Epoxy?
features.subtitle: The smart choice for modern flooring

items.title: High Durability
items.description: Withstands heavy foot traffic, machinery, and impacts — built to last for decades.

items.title: Seamless Finish
items.description: Smooth, joint-free surface that's easy to clean and maintains a pristine look.

items.title: Chemical Resistant
items.description: Resists oils, acids, solvents, and chemicals — ideal for industrial environments.

items.title: Easy Maintenance
items.description: Simple cleaning with minimal upkeep. No waxing, polishing, or special treatments needed.

items.title: Cost Effective
items.description: Long lifespan and low maintenance costs make it the most economical flooring solution.

training.title: Training Academy
training.subtitle: Learn & Earn
training.description: Master the art of professional epoxy flooring and waterproofing with our hands-on training program.
points: Learn epoxy flooring professionally from industry experts
Start your own epoxy & waterproofing business
Hands-on practical sessions with real projects

process.title: Our Process
process.subtitle: From inspection to perfection — a systematic approach

steps.title: Inspection
steps.description: Thorough assessment of the existing surface, environment conditions, and project requirements.

steps.title: Surface Preparation
steps.description: Professional grinding, cleaning, and priming to ensure maximum coating adhesion.

steps.title: Coating Application
steps.description: Precision application of premium epoxy coatings using industry-leading techniques.

steps.title: Finishing
steps.description: Final top coat, quality inspection, and curing for a flawless, long-lasting result.

cta.headline: Build Strong. Build Smart.
cta.subheading: Ready to transform your space with premium flooring solutions?

footer.about: Shree Shyam Constructions is a trusted name in professional epoxy flooring and waterproofing solutions, delivering quality and durability since inception.
